deploy_notes: npm install with --legacy-peer-deps --ignore-scripts, replaced node-sass with sass@1.32, installed highlight.js, fixed rrule import. Node 16 required. ng serve compiled successfully on port 4200.
reasoning: mano-cua 无法在 Chrome 中注册点击事件。3 次尝试均失败：(1) 翻译栏出现后所有点击无响应 (2) 禁用翻译后仍然点击无响应 (3) 指示不最小化面板后仍然无法点击。Day/Week/Month 按钮、右键菜单、Chrome 菜单栏、DevTools 快捷键全部无效。部署本身成功，curl 返回 200。
